Meaning.En: made of or relating to synthetic or semi-synthetic organic compounds that are malleable and can be molded into solid objects; also, (of a person or behavior) easily influenced or shaped.
Meaning.Example: The children played with plastic toys in the sandbox.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả vật liệu tổng hợp có thể tạo hình khi nóng, dùng để làm đồ dùng, bao bì, thiết bị điện tử...
Situation.En: Refers to synthetic materials that can be molded into shape, commonly used for packaging, construction, and manufacturing.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả tính cách dễ bị ảnh hưởng hoặc thay đổi theo hoàn cảnh (nghĩa bóng).
Situation.En: Used metaphorically to describe someone who is easily influenced or adaptable, sometimes in a negative sense.

Meaning.En: a synthetic material made from polymers that can be molded into shape; often used in singular form to refer to plastic material collectively.
Meaning.Example: Recycling plastic helps reduce ocean pollution.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả vật liệu nhựa dùng trong sản xuất đồ dùng, bao bì, thiết bị...
Situation.En: Refers to the physical substance used to make molded products, especially in manufacturing and consumer goods.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả tình trạng ô nhiễm môi trường do rác nhựa.
Situation.En: Used in environmental contexts to highlight pollution caused by non-biodegradable plastic waste.
